name: compactor
description: Cheap-model tool result compaction guided by the intent plugin's cache; alternative to keyword_compactor — run ONE of the two, after 'intent'

permissions.name: env.host_call.torana_offload_completion
permissions.description: Delegate to cheap model for summarization

permissions.name: env.host_call.torana_evaluate_compaction
permissions.description: Apply model-generated replacements only when the batch has positive estimated net savings
